name: Dinosaur World 3
description: Basics about the creatures that once ruled the Earth.

questions.question: Which of these was one of the smallest dinosaurs, about the size of a chicken?
What were the feathers on some dinosaurs likely used for?
Which dinosaur is known for its giant claws, which could be up to 1 meter long?
What is the name of the supercontinent that existed when dinosaurs first appeared?
True or false: Some dinosaurs, like the Maiasaura, cared for their babies in nests.
Which of these was a massive long-necked dinosaur from South America?
What did the Oviraptor mostly eat, according to its name (though later disputed)?
Which dinosaur had two horns over its eyes and a bull-like appearance?
What part of a dinosaur's body is most commonly turned into a fossil?
Were there any dinosaurs that lived in the water like fish?
